web_results.title: 2026 United States military buildup in the Middle East - Wikipedia
web_results.description: It was not clear if Trump would make a decision by the weekend. On February 19, 2026, the US could launch military strikes on Iran within days, according to reports, as the White House issued a stark warning that Tehran should make a deal.
